name: Spinach Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the spinach.
2. Mix together the cooked spinach, herb stuffing, finely chopped onions, beaten eggs, Parmesan cheese, thyme, melted butter, pepper, and garlic salt until well combined.
3. Form the mixture into balls.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
